name: Reflex Plus Adult Cat Food Canned - Beef Chunks in Loaf Pate 400g
description: Reflex Plus Beef Chunks in Loaf Pate Adult Cat Canned Food , fully-balanced, beef protein-containing cat food carefully formulated by cat / dog nutritionists to meet the nutritional requirements of all adult breeds. NUTRIENT COMPONENTS Crude Protein (%) - 9.0 Crude Oils & Fats (%) - 5.0 Crude Cellulose (Fiber) (%) - 0.2 Moisture (%) - 80 Crude Ash (%) - 2.5 Vitamin D3 - 240 IE/kg Vitamin A - 1650 IE/kg Iron - 0.6 mg/kg Copper - 1.4 mg/kg Iodine - 24 ?g/kg Manganese - 1.8 mg/kg Zinc - 9.5 mg/kg Selenium - 0.025 mg/kg INGREDIENTS: Meat and animal derivatives (4% beef), cereals, fish and fish derivatives, vegetal protein extracts, minerals, cassia gum (1200 mg/kg), perservers and colourants. FEEDING RECOMMENDATION: One can per two meals. An adult cat (approx. 4kg) requires up to 3 meals per day. Individual requirements depend on factors like age, breed and activity. Serve at room temperature. Store in a cool, dry place. Not fit for human consumption.
